title: two-pane rework with brass-on-ink theme
description:
## Summary
- Replace the 340-line dark-generic `InboxApp.svelte` with a focused two-pane layout (sidebar · list · detail) under `website/src/components/inbox/`
- Brass-on-ink visual treatment matching the rest of `/admin/*` chrome
- Per-type detail panes — quick approve/decline for registration & booking, resolution-note flow for bug, full thread + inline reply for user_message
- Keyboard shortcuts (j/k, A/D/E/⏎, /, g 1-6, ⌘⏎) via a pure unit-tested handler
- Mobile collapse: list-only by default, tap row → full-screen detail with back

Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-admin-inbox-rework-design.md` (committed in `f75f2ebf`)

Built by two parallel subagents in isolated worktrees:
- Agent A (website) → `worktree-agent-acfdc38a59b66374a` → 4 Svelte components + `inbox-shortcuts.ts` + `type-meta.ts` + 26-case vitest unit suite
- Agent B (test) → `feature/admin-inbox-rework-tests` → 8-scenario Playwright spec keyed off the `data-testid` contract in spec §10

## Test plan
- [x] Vitest unit suite for keyboard handler — 26/26 pass at root
- [x] `astro check` — 0 errors in inbox files (pre-existing 16 errors elsewhere unchanged)
- [x] No API or DB schema changes
- [ ] Deploy to mentolder + korczewski; smoke `/admin/inbox` on both
- [ ] Run `npx playwright test fa-admin-inbox.spec.ts` against live web.mentolder.de after deploy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
